pricing_tier.quote_span: Sensor modules are priced at $85.00 per unit for orders of 1 to 500 units, and $72.00 per unit for orders of 501 units or more, per purchase order.

msa_sow_linkage.order_of_precedence_note: Except as expressly modified herein, this SOW is subject to the terms of the MPA in all respects, including its limitation of liability and confidentiality provisions.
msa_sow_linkage.quote_span: This Statement of Work is issued under and governed by the Master Purchase Agreement dated October 1, 2022 (the "MPA")
msa_sow_linkage.annotation_note: Distractor case: the document names two agreements. The Reseller Agreement with a third party (Kettlebrook Supply Co.) is explicitly disclaimed as having no bearing on this SOW and must not be extracted as the governing document. This tests precision under a same-document red herring, a wrong extraction here would name the Reseller Agreement or merge both references.
